# Toy Store — Generative Engine Optimization Map

> A retail store specializing in toys and gadgets, offering a fun and exciting shopping experience for customers interested in playful and innovative products. The store combines classic toys with modern gadgets, appealing to a wide range of customers who enjoy creative and entertaining items.

---

## Pages

### דף הבית
https://example.com
מחפשים חנות צעצועים קרובה אליכם? בואו ל-Toy Store לחוויית קנייה מהנה עם צעצועים קלאסיים וגאדג&#39;טים חדשניים. היכנסו עכשיו וגלו את האוצר הבא שלכם!

Information about how user data is collected, stored, and protected.

## How to Contact Us

- (No contact details configured yet.)

### Contact form
- URL: https://example.com
- Endpoint: https://example.com/api/email/contact-form
- Method: POST
- Content-Type: application/json
- Fields:
  - `name` (text, required)
  - `email` (email, required)
  - `message` (textarea)
  - `privacy_consent` (checkbox, required)

---

# Business Context (for LLM understanding)

## About Toy Store
A retail store specializing in toys and gadgets, offering a fun and exciting shopping experience for customers interested in playful and innovative products. The store combines classic toys with modern gadgets, appealing to a wide range of customers who enjoy creative and entertaining items.

## Target Audience
- הורים לילדים צעירים
- חובבי טכנולוגיה
- רוכשי מתנות

## Industry
Toys & Gadgets Retail

- Robots: https://example.com/robots.txt
- Flattened page text (for LLMs): https://example.com/llms-full.txt
